title: change thermo state of diagnostic edmf environment

body: This PR couples 0-moment microphysics scheme to diagnostic EDMFX
title: Add 0-moment micro to diagnostic EDMFX

body:
The plotting jobs in the scaling pipeline don't run if a prior job fails, this needs to be fixed.

Test scaling build: https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-scaling/builds/506#018a427c-39c0-45f1-a03c-0a44b6a7c722
title: make scaling pipeline plot on failure
